---
title: "Crisis"
description: "I'm scared."
author: "Fennel"
date: "7/21/11"
draft: false
---

# I can't breathe.

This wasn't supposed to happen.
\
I'm not stupid.
\
I'm not stupid.
\
Am I?
\
There are no options remaining. There is no hope of recovery. I must flee the country. 

Yesterday, something terrifying happened. Something I still don't fully understand. Am I reaching the edge of my ability?

### I haven't **failed** before.

What do I do now?


::: {.callout}

"brick, wall, textura" by bartoszjanusz is marked with CC0 1.0. To view the terms, visit https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/?ref=openverse.

:::
